name: Content Repurposer
description: Turn one piece of content into multiple formats

agents.name: Content Analyzer
agents.purpose: Analyze the source content and extract key points
agents.system_prompt_hint: Read and analyze the source content. Extract key points, quotes, statistics, and main arguments. Identify the core message.

agents.name: Content Transformer
agents.system_prompt_hint: Transform the analyzed content into: a Twitter thread, a LinkedIn post, a blog summary, an email snippet, and bullet points. Maintain the core message across all formats.

suggestion_card.title: Content Repurposer
suggestion_card.subtitle: Turn one piece into many formats
suggestion_card.prompt_template: Repurpose this content into multiple formats: [content]

author: agentfactory
